name: synetairismos-astynomikon-offers
description: Static GitHub Pages site for Synetelas offers.

scripts.check: npm run build && html-validate index.html && node --check ./assets/js/offers-data.js && node --check ./assets/js/offers-renderer.js && node --check ./assets/js/wizard-ui.js && node --check ./assets/js/main.js && node ./scripts/check-repo-clean.mjs && node ./scripts/check-static-assets.mjs
